name: badge
title: Badge
description: A small status indicator with variant styling.

docs.overview: Badge displays a short status label with background color. Use for tags, statuses, and categories.
docs.accessibility: Badge text should be concise and meaningful.

examples.name: variants
examples.title: Badge Variants
examples.code:
HStack(8, [
  Badge({ children: 'Default' }),
  Badge({ children: 'Secondary', variant: 'secondary' }),
  Badge({ children: 'Destructive', variant: 'destructive' }),
  Badge({ children: 'Outline', variant: 'outline' }),
])

agent.summary: Badge shows a short status or category label.
layoutHints: Use sparingly for important status information
accessibilityChecklist: Keep badge text short and descriptive
